creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Henning Matyschok from comment #13)

You can call me Fernando, Mr. Apesteguia or whatever you like, no problem there :-)

> Git was not utilized accessing the ports tree.

The Project moved to git long ago. You are using a *very outdated* repository version. One that is frozen in time.

Please, update your patch using the *latest version of the git repository*

https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/upgrading/#git-diff

Cheers
